steps.description: Click on the search input field within the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface to activate it for text entry.
Type text: 'coffee agent' into the search bar located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Create" button next to the "Coffee ..." sample in the "Featured samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the text input field labeled "Type a message..." at coordinates (102, 719) to enter a message in the chat interface of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" application.

parameters.text: I want to add a coffee shop

steps.description: Type text: 'I want to add a coffee shop ' into the input field located at the bottom of the chat interface in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground application.
Press the "Enter" key to submit text entered in the input box below the chat interface within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" application.
